The post Ca7riel & Paco Amoroso – “Goo Goo Ga Ga” (Feat. Jack Black) appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Argentinian duo CA7RIEL and Paco Amoroso have a new album Free Spirits coming out next week. Today, on their latest single "Goo Goo Ga Ga," they team up with comedic king Jack Black. It is weird...but also playful? The heart of the song frets about mortality and getting older ("La juventud se me fue/ No sé si la aproveché/ Quisiera ser un bebé"), but it also plays with pop song tropes. Ca7riel, Amoroso, and Black sing about wanting to be someone's baby, having a baby, and being a baby.

In the accompanying video directed by Ferina, all three revert back to their baby minds with a futuristic cryo-cerberal rebirth experience. I guess it's a reference to trying to connect with your inner child after feeling the ridiculous pressures from adulthood? Still, it's kinda weird. 

You can watch that below. 

Free Spirits is out 3/19. Pre-order here.
